moments.title: The Open Championship Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship continues at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with the final rounds playing out this weekend.

angles.name: Live Golf Action
angles.copy: It's moving day at Royal Birkdale! Who will conquer the course and edge closer to the Claret Jug at The Open Championship this weekend?

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: The drama unfolds over the next few days at The Open Championship. Tune in to see the world's best battle it out for golf's most prestigious title.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup culminates with the final match on Sunday, July 19th, after a month of thrilling knockout stage action.

angles.name: World Cup Final Build-up
angles.copy: Who lifts the trophy? The FIFA World Cup 2026 Final is just days away! Get ready for the biggest game in football this Sunday.

angles.name: Bronze Final
angles.copy: Before the big one, the Bronze Final for the FIFA World Cup 2026 takes place on Saturday. Who's taking home third place?

moments.title: Love Island UK Final Approaches
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 wraps up on Monday, July 27th, with the grand final on ITV2 and ITVX after eight weeks of villa drama.

angles.name: Love Island Countdown
angles.copy: The end is in sight for Love Island UK 2026! Who are your bets to win the £50k and be crowned this year's champions?

angles.name: Final Week Buzz
angles.copy: Only a week left until the Love Island UK final! What's been your favourite moment, and which couple deserves to win?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary, brings music, arts, and comedy to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26.

angles.name: Latitude Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for four days of unforgettable music, comedy, and arts! Latitude Festival kicks off next week in Suffolk.

angles.name: Festival Lineup Tease
angles.copy: Who are you most excited to see at Latitude Festival? Celebrating 20 years with a stacked lineup from July 23-26!

moments.title: WOMAD Festival Begins Next Week
moments.blurb: The World's Festival, WOMAD, celebrates global music, arts, dance, and culture at Neston Park, Wiltshire from July 23-26.

angles.name: Global Rhythms Incoming
angles.copy: WOMAD Festival is just around the corner! Immerse yourself in a world of music, dance, and culture in Wiltshire, July 23-26.

angles.name: Festival of Discovery
angles.copy: Beyond the headliners, WOMAD is all about discovery. What new sounds will you find at Neston Park next week?

moments.title: Together Again Festival in Cheshire
moments.blurb: Together Again Festival returns to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24-26, offering a mix of music, arts, and family fun.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for a weekend of music and good times! Together Again Festival is at Bolesworth Castle next weekend.

angles.name: Dance & Rewind Arenas
angles.copy: From tech house to pop classics, the Agora and Rewind Arenas promise big names and good vibes at Together Again Festival, July 24-26!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is currently bringing traditional and contemporary Scottish music to Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, until July 18.

angles.name: Celtic Sounds Live
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is in full swing! If you're in Stornoway, immerse yourself in incredible music and island culture until Sunday.

angles.name: Island Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Beautiful music and stunning scenery! The Hebridean Celtic Festival continues to celebrate the best of Scottish talent.

moments.title: Splendour Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, Splendour, takes over Wollaton Hall & Deer Park from July 18-19, featuring multiple stages of music.

angles.name: Splendour Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Splendour Festival! Who's heading to Wollaton Hall this weekend for Nottinghamshire's biggest music event?

angles.name: Festival Fun
angles.copy: Five stages of music across all genres in the beautiful setting of Wollaton Hall. Get ready for Splendour Festival this Saturday and Sunday!

moments.title: Will Ferrell Turns 59
moments.blurb: Today, July 16th, actor and comedian Will Ferrell celebrates his 59th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Will Ferrell
angles.copy: From Anchorman to Elf, the legend Will Ferrell is 59 today! What's your favourite Will Ferrell movie moment?

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Will Ferrell on his 59th birthday! He's brought us so many laughs over the years.

moments.title: Stewart Copeland is 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, co-founder and drummer of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 16th.

angles.name: Police Drummer Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary Stewart Copeland of The Police! What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Rhythmic Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating the dynamic drumming and innovative style of Stewart Copeland, 74 today! A true rock icon.

moments.title: Wizkid Turns 35
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar Wizkid, known for blending Afrobeats, R&B, and pop, celebrates his 35th birthday today, July 16th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Wizkid
angles.copy: Big 3-5 for the Starboy! Happy Birthday to the global Afrobeats sensation, Wizkid! What's your go-to track?

angles.name: Afrobeats King
angles.copy: Celebrating Wizkid's 35th birthday! From 'One Dance' to 'Brown Skin Girl,' he's a true trailblazer.

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Brian May, this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Celebrating the rock royalty that is Brian May on his birthday. His riffs are timeless!

moments.title: Carlos Santana Turns 79
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incomparable Carlos Santana on Monday! His guitar work is pure magic.

angles.name: Timeless Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring influence of Carlos Santana. Which of his classic tracks is always on your playlist?

moments.title: Yusuf / Cat Stevens is 78
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, famously known as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the brilliant Yusuf Islam, also known as Cat Stevens, this Tuesday! What's your favourite song from him?

angles.name: Timeless Melodies
angles.copy: From 'Father and Son' to 'Wild World', celebrating the enduring artistry of Yusuf Islam on his birthday.

moments.title: George Clinton Turns 85
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Master Birthday
angles.copy: Get up for the downstroke! Happy 85th Birthday to the one and only George Clinton this Wednesday!

angles.name: P-Funk Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the iconic George Clinton, whose Parliament-Funkadelic changed music forever. What's your favourite funk anthem?

moments.title: Don Henley is 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drummer Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Don Henley of the Eagles this Wednesday! A voice and talent like no other.

angles.name: Classic Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the man behind so many timeless hits, from 'Hotel California' to his solo work. Happy Birthday, Don Henley!

moments.title: Selena Gomez Turns 34
moments.blurb: Actress and pop singer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the multi-talented Selena Gomez this Wednesday! What's your favourite Selena track?

angles.name: Celebrating Selena
angles.copy: From Disney to chart-topper, celebrating Selena Gomez's 34th birthday! Her influence spans music, film, and TV.

moments.title: Verdine White Turns 75
moments.blurb: Verdine White, bassist for the iconic band Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Friday, July 25th.

angles.name: Funk Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Shining bright! Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire this Friday!

angles.name: Earth Wind & Fire Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring groove of Verdine White, whose bass lines have made us dance for decades. Happy Birthday!

moments.title: UK Summer Weather Continues
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing generally dry and settled summer weather, with sunny spells and warm temperatures, though some showers are possible later in the month.

angles.name: Sunshine & Showers
angles.copy: More sunshine and warm temperatures for many across the UK this week! Don't forget the brolly though, isolated showers could pop up.

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Making the most of the summer weather! Perfect for getting out and about, but keep an eye on those changing forecasts.

moments.title: New UK TV This July
moments.blurb: New series like the BBC comedy 'Ann Droid' and ITV thriller 'The Dark' are currently airing or recently premiered, alongside Netflix's 'Little House on the Prairie' adaptation and 'Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar'.

angles.name: What To Watch Now
angles.copy: Looking for something new to binge? This July has brought some great new TV, from comedy 'Ann Droid' to thriller 'The Dark'!

angles.name: Streaming Hot List
angles.copy: Catch up on new releases like 'Little House on the Prairie' on Netflix and 'Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar'!

moments.title: Celebrity Deal Or No Deal
moments.blurb: A new series of 'Celebrity Deal Or No Deal' is set to premiere on ITV1 on Saturday, July 25th at 7pm.

angles.name: Game Show Return
angles.copy: The iconic red boxes are back! 'Celebrity Deal Or No Deal' kicks off a new series this Saturday on ITV1. Who do you want to see play?

angles.name: Saturday Night Fun
angles.copy: Get ready for some celebrity briefcase drama! 'Celebrity Deal Or No Deal' is your Saturday night entertainment, July 25th.
